message:
feat: Add commonly used modules to runtime.Lib and fix Zig 0.15 issues

Added module exports:
- copy, textwrap, tempfile (guarded), weakref, warnings, types
- operator, inspect, doctest, importlib

Fixed Zig 0.15 compilation errors:
- operator.zig: Changed in-place operations from *anytype to comptime T
- textwrap.zig: Renamed local 'indent' to 'line_indent' (avoid shadowing)
- types.zig: Changed resolve_bases from []const anytype to anytype
- Removed pointless discards in operator.zig and types.zig
